prompt: Code review: what's wrong stylistically with `(do_stuff: x) { Compute the X from the <a> + the <b>. }`?
expected: Three style issues: `do_stuff` should be `Do Stuff` (Title Case for feature-set names), the activity `x` should be a Title-Cased noun phrase, and the result `X` needs angle brackets and hyphenated lowercase. Fixed: `(Do Stuff: Example) { Compute the <x> from <a> + <b>. Return an <OK: status> with <x>. }`
